name: zeb/prosemirror
description: ProseMirror 1.41 rich text editor for RWE templates. Two-way stateKey reactive bridge, SPA/API-first MutationObserver auto-mount, extensible toolbar system, built-in doodle/photo/link plugins, instance registry via window.__zebProse.

full-1.41.note: All PM packages bundled inline via esbuild. No CDN fetches at runtime. Build: cd /tmp/zeb-pm-build && npm install && node_modules/.bin/esbuild entry.mjs --bundle --format=esm --minify --outfile=prosemirror.bundle.mjs
